workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template DT-D cost pages)
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each page in order (Turkey first, then Spain, Greece).
After step 1, copy the returned keyword id into step 2.
After step 2, copy the returned page id into steps 3–5.
Steps 3, 4, 5 have no JSON body — only path/query params.
Put the full content brief in the keyword notes field.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-D (~1,800 words). Turkey is a leading dental tourism destination. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Dental Cost in Turkey: Direct Answer, (2) Implant Costs per Tooth, (3) Veneer and Crown Prices, (4) All-on-4 Pricing, (5) Add-On Costs, (6) Travel and Logistics Costs, (7) Total All-In Cost Scenarios, (8) Hidden Costs Patients Reported, (9) How Turkey Compares With UK/USA, (10) What Affects Dental Price?, (11) FAQ. Cost range €300–€600/implant. Link to country and city guides, treatment page.

body.title: Dental Cost in Turkey 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Dental Cost Turkey 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Dental work in Turkey costs €300–€600 per implant based on verified patient interviews. See implant, veneer, all-on-4 pricing, hidden fees, and all-in costs.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-D (~1,800 words). Spain offers EU-regulated dental clinics in Barcelona and Madrid. REQUIRED H2s: same as Turkey cost page adapted for Spain. Cost range €500–€900/implant. Emphasize EU medical standards, shorter flights from UK. Link to Spain country and city guides.

body.title: Dental Cost in Spain 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Dental Cost Spain 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Dental work in Spain costs €500–€900 per implant. EU-regulated clinics in Barcelona and Madrid with verified patient pricing data.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-D (~1,800 words). Greece offers mid-range pricing with Athens as the primary hub. REQUIRED H2s: same cost page structure. Cost range €400–€750/implant. Link to Greece country and Athens city guides.

body.title: Dental Cost in Greece 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: Dental Cost Greece 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Dental work in Greece costs €400–€750 per implant. Athens clinics with verified implant and veneer pricing and patient interview data.
